title: Totally Decayed Wither Storm
description:
this turns crackers wither storm mod to a brand new decayed reality experience

V2 MODELS SOON!
body:
This Resource Pack makes the [Crackers Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) look like [Decayed Reality Addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/decayed-reality-add-on)

NOTE: This Is A Compilation of Resource Packs Into One, made to fit into Decayed Reality, also its not 100% accurate for now, but there will be subphases like in decayed reality, just not too accurate

V2 MODELS SOON

# CREDITS
[3d Mobs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/story-mode-style) - [witherstorm0](https://modrinth.com/user/witherstorm0)

[Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars) - [Naku](https://modrinth.com/user/Naku) (Edited by Me to change the bossbar to be accurate)

[Decayed Reality Music Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/decayed-reality-music-pack) - [Notsoraven010](https://www.curseforge.com/members/notsoraven010/projects)

[Totally Accurate Wither Storm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/totally-accurate-wither-storm) - [De4dTainted](https://www.curseforge.com/members/de4dtainted/projects)

Rest of the features - [KeirtIsBackTL](https://modrinth.com/user/KeirtIsBackTL)

# REQUIREMENTS

 [Crackers Wither Storm](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) ![Wither](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kWjNGDUH/191824abe129da4c7b97d6a43af9d22228596cb1_96.webp)
 
 [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)![ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BVzZfTc1/af683d206d50b05258d865b0d6e4aa2f2cee12f2_96.webp)
 
 [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4I1XuqiY/6e5bbd0d06b1741bfdab6c0cfab6de8fdaf0064c_96.webp)
